messages.text: hi! my civic is making a grinding noise when I brake. how soon could you get me in?
Hi Henry! Sounds like brake pads — could be a safety issue. Earliest opening is Thursday 10am for full inspection + pad replacement, around $260. Want me to hold it?
yes please 🙏
Confirmed Thursday 10am. Texting you the confirmation now. Drive carefully until then. ✓
Hi! Saw your shop on Yelp. Need a quote for timing belt replacement — 2018 Toyota Corolla.
Hi Marisol! Good news — your 2018 Corolla has a timing CHAIN, not a belt. No replacement needed. When was your last service?
Oh wow, didn't know that. About 50k miles ago.
Perfect — you're due for a 60k checkup, $180. Wednesday 2pm or Friday 9am?
Friday 9am
Booked ✓ See you Friday!
is anyone awake?? my subaru is shifting really weird, almost stalled at a light
Hi David! I'm Sofía's after-hours assistant. CVT shifting issues — common in Subarus 2014–2018. Don't drive far. Can you bring it in at 8am tomorrow?
yes thank you omg
Booked 8am. Sofía will call you in the morning to confirm. Try not to drive until then. ✓
hi! first time customer — found you through my friend Maritza. she mentioned a new customer special?
Yes! Maritza is one of our favorites. First-timer special: $30 off any service over $100. What does your car need?
oil change + tire rotation for my Lexus IS
Lexus IS oil + rotation — $90 normally, $60 with the special. Saturday 11am or Monday 3pm?
Saturday please
Booked ✓ Tell Maritza Sofía says gracias!
hey, I left a 1-star review last week. honestly wanted to give you a chance to make it right before I gave up
Tom, thank you for reaching out — that means a lot. I'm reading your review now… 25-minute wait, no urgency from staff. That's on us. Would you let Sofía call you tomorrow morning to talk through it?
yeah ok
Set — she'll call you at 9am. I'm also holding a free oil change slot at noon if she can't resolve it over the phone. ✓
hi! do you work on hybrid batteries? my 2016 Honda Insight is showing the IMA light
Yes! IMA light on a 2016 Insight is usually the battery pack aging. We can run a diagnostic ($120) first, then decide on replacement ($1,800–$2,400) if needed. Diagnostic Wednesday 11am?
yes please
Booked ✓ See you Wednesday.
